title: Savory Silky German Pepper Stir-fry
description: This quick-fix vegan dish features marinated green peppers in a savory sauce for a silky texture that's perfect for any meal.
instructions: Wash the bell peppers and slice them into thin strips.
Combine minced garlic, lemon juice, nutritional yeast, smoked paprika, soy sauce, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Heat up a pan with a drizzle of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced bell peppers to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until slightly softened but still crisp.
Pour the marinade mixture into the pan, stirring continuously for another minute to let the flavors meld together.
